explanationHtml:
Step 1: Identify the angle relationship.
When a transversal cuts two parallel lines, same-side interior angles (co-interior / consecutive interior angles) are supplementary, summing to 180°. From the figure, $x$ and $36$ are same-side interior angles.

Step 2: Set up and solve.
$x+36=180$
$x=144$

Step 3: Test all four choices.

  • Choice A — ‘44’: $44+36=80\neq 180$ ✗
  • Choice B — ‘54’: $54+36=90\neq 180$ ✗
  • Choice C — ‘144’: $144+36=180$ ✓
  • Choice D — ‘324’: Exceeds 180°, impossible for an interior angle ✗

That matches choice C — C is correct.
